selected.reason: This frame captures a complete UI state of an interactive music learning application, showing a mood-based selection interface with labeled stickers (e.g., 'Kalimba', 'Swing', 'Piano'), a central visual artifact (portrait with 'harp_contemplative_harp' label), and control elements (Score, Miser, play/pause). It represents a teachable moment on mood-based music selection and demonstrates the application's functionality. The visual clarity and completeness make it ideal for distillation.

dropped_summary: No other frames were provided for evaluation. This contact sheet contains only one frame, which meets the selection criteria as a complete, clear, and information-rich visual state from the course demo.
